sessions.task_summary: FIRST session for the kinalys-web (frontend) repo. Read docs/KINALYS_AUDIT_PROMPT.md (this repo's copy), surveyed src/ structure (47 source files: 8 components, 31 pages, api/client.ts, contexts, utils; React 19 + TS 4.9 + CRA/react-scripts + axios + Auth0-react + jspdf + xlsx + @anthropic-ai/sdk). Created audit/ and built qa_task_queue.json from scratch (task_001 Phase 0 + 12 Phase-1 dimension tasks task_002..task_013, sub-chunked by area, each with intended_model) + this qa_session_log.json. Ran PHASE 0 ONLY: wrote audit/DEMO_SCAFFOLDING_INVENTORY.md cataloguing the frontend demo scaffolding -- DemoSwitcher.tsx (DEMO_PERSONAS = 17 hardcoded persona UUIDs + localStorage helpers + switcher UI, mounted UNGATED at App.tsx:775), the X-Demo-User-Id axios interceptor (client.ts:19-26, frontend half of the dual-caller path, ungated), demo/seed API wrappers (seedDemoScorecards POST /talent/seed-demo + triggerDemoBreach POST /scorecard/demo-breach = DEMO-ONLY; seedKbArticles + fixLmsEmojis = borderline maintenance), and demo UI surfaces (App.tsx:458-480 'Fire Breach Alert' card on the home dashboard, TalentGrid 'Seed Demo Scores' button, KnowledgeBase 'Seed Articles' button). KEY CROSS-CUTTING OBSERVATION (handed to task_003, NOT a Phase-0 finding): a repo-wide grep for process.env/NODE_ENV/DEMO_MODE/isDev returns ZERO hits -> NOTHING in the frontend is environment-gated; every demo artifact ships/activates in any build (the frontend analog of platform finding F-066). No hardcoded demo tenant ID (108810fc) or cycle IDs in the frontend -- only the 17 persona UUIDs (recorded so Phase 1 doesn't hunt for them). Backend demo artifacts (reseed migrations, auth.ts header read) are N/A here (live in kinalys-platform, NOT touched this session). STOPPED for operator review before any Phase 1 task, per instruction. Findings in this repo will use the W- prefix. Phase-1 carries surfaced + parked on the right tasks: @anthropic-ai/sdk in frontend package.json (secret-in-bundle/IF-007 -> task_002); hardcoded API_URL + Auth0 audience + mojibake debt (-> task_011); xlsx@0.18.5/jspdf/react-scripts CRA deps (-> task_013); window.location.reload + state-based nav (-> task_004). NEXT: operator reviews the inventory; then Phase 1 starts at task_002 (frontend security, intended Opus 4.8 High).

sessions.task_summary: Completed task_002 (D1/D2 frontend security) -- first Phase-1 task for kinalys-web. 1 finding W-001 in audit/qa_findings_task_002.md + the new consolidated audit/QA_FINDINGS.md register (created this session). W-001 S2 (OWASP A03 stored XSS): KnowledgeBase.tsx renderMarkdown (lines 30-42) is a hand-rolled regex markdown->HTML converter that NEVER escapes < > & in the source text (it only ADDS tags for markdown tokens), and its output is injected via dangerouslySetInnerHTML at line 271; no DOMPurify/sanitizer exists anywhere in the repo; KB articles render to ALL roles (canSee('kb') = everyone), so any author/seed of article content with raw HTML (

sessions.task_summary: Completed task_003 (ARCH -- frontend DEMO_MODE/NODE_ENV separation gap). ONE finding W-002 (S2, OWASP A05 Security Misconfiguration) in audit/qa_findings_task_003.md + QA_FINDINGS.md, exactly as mandated by prompt §0.5 (no per-artifact demo findings). FINDING: a repo-wide grep for process.env/NODE_ENV/isDev/DEMO_MODE across src/ returns ZERO hits -> NOTHING in the frontend is environment-aware, so every demo surface ships/activates in any build: the DemoSwitcher persona-switcher (mount App.tsx:775 + whole DemoSwitcher.tsx incl. DEMO_PERSONAS 17 real names+UUIDs), the X-Demo-User-Id axios interceptor (client.ts:19-26), the 'Fire Breach Alert' live-mutation card on the home dashboard (App.tsx:458-480), and the Seed buttons (TalentGrid/KnowledgeBase). S2 (architectural, not per-artifact): the build has NO demo-vs-prod boundary at all (no env flag, no conditional mount, no build-time exclusion); shipped as-is it would put an impersonation UI + a live-mutation demo button + 17 personas' PII in front of production users. Frontend analog of platform F-066 -- resolve together. Fix: a single REACT_APP_DEMO_MODE build flag (default false in prod) gating ALL demo surfaces so prod tree-shakes them out, and the prod bundle must never attach X-Demo-User-Id. Points at DEMO_SCAFFOLDING_INVENTORY.md as the separation spec. Running totals (kinalys-web): 0xS1, 2xS2, 0xS3, 0xS4 = 2 findings. Next: task_004 (D7 frontend architecture/nav/state-mgmt/Decision-82 hardcoded bands), intended Opus 4.7.

sessions.task_summary: Completed task_004 (D7 frontend architecture & correctness). 4 findings W-003..W-006 in audit/qa_findings_task_004.md + QA_FINDINGS.md. HEADLINE W-003 (S2, D7/D1): setAuthToken() is defined (client.ts:27-29, sets axios Authorization=Bearer) and imported (App.tsx:3) but a repo-wide grep shows it is NEVER CALLED -- App.tsx:116 obtains the Auth0 token via getAccessTokenSilently then immediately fires the Promise.allSettled API batch without attaching it; so the axios client never sets an Authorization header and real (non-demo) API requests fail closed (401). The app authenticates ONLY via the demo X-Demo-User-Id path -> production-auth path is unwired in the frontend (go-live blocker, pairs with W-002). W-004 (S3): hardcoded RAG/performance-band thresholds (>=90/>=80/>=75/<70) inline in 36 places across 10 files (App.tsx:650/654/658, ExecDashboard 10x, Scorecard, TalentGrid, COPCScorecard, PKTEngine, PredictiveAnalysis, CompetencyFramework, reportExport) -- violates Decision 82 (bands must be tenant-configurable) + frontend one-source-per-number; each site re-encodes boundary + color mapping. W-005 (S3, D4/D7): pervasive `any` typing -- 246 occurrences across 38 files incl. the whole client.ts API layer (responses typed Record<string,any>/untyped) and component state; TS provides little protection on the data-crossing-API surface (hotspots HrFlagsInbox 24, Competency 17, KpiTemplates 16, Scorecard 16, Predictive 16, Exec 15); fix = response interfaces (pattern already exists for softDeleteUser/listDepartures/suggestBriefsForUser/getMyAdaptiveAssignments) + no-explicit-any lint. W-006 (S4): window.location.reload() used to refresh data after fixLmsEmojis (CourseCatalog.tsx:64) instead of React state re-fetch; state-based nav (App.tsx activeNav ternary, no router) has no deep-linking/back-button (intentional per stack facts -> recorded as limitation, not defect). PASS/observations: App.tsx:117 Promise.allSettled parallel load (good); the window.location.href-for-NAVIGATION anti-pattern is ABSENT (only Auth0 origin redirect + 2 .reload() calls); several API fns are properly typed (the pattern to extend for W-005). Carries: native alert()/inline error UX -> task_006; eager import of all 31 pages (no code-split) -> task_009. Running totals (kinalys-web): 0xS1, 3xS2, 2xS3, 1xS4 = 6 findings. Next: task_005 (D7 UI checklist batch 1 items 1-33 layout/typography/design-system), intended Sonnet 4.6.

sessions.task_summary: Completed task_005 (D7 -- UI checklist batch 1, items 1-33: design system, layout/responsive, typography). Read kinalys.css (1390 lines: full --k-* token system, 9 themes, responsive breakpoints at 768px/480px, shadow/radius/spacing/color scales), index.html, App.css (CRA default boilerplate, not used), App.tsx shell (topbar + sidebar + main nav section). Key reads: kinalys.css full design system confirmed; App.tsx inline style audit; Grep for number formatting (.toFixed/.toLocaleString) across all .tsx. 4 findings W-007..W-010. W-007 S4: design token bypass -- hardcoded hex colors (#EF4444 notification badge, #FFFBEB unread-alert row, #B45309 alert KPI name in App.tsx inline styles) bypass --k-* system and will break under themes; privacy modal section in kinalys.css references 4 undefined CSS vars (--k-font-body, --k-border-faint, --k-red, --k-red-faint) that silently fall back to browser defaults -- privacy modal ignores theming. W-008 S3: no mobile navigation -- .k-sidebar { display:none } at <=768px (kinalys.css:1227) with zero replacement; all 28+ nav items (5 collapsible sections) in App.tsx sidebar block unreachable on mobile/tablet; topbar has no hamburger trigger; activeNav defaults to home and cannot be changed on mobile -- app is desktop-only for navigation. W-009 S3: WCAG AA contrast failure for --k-text-muted (#94A3B8 on #FFFFFF = ~2.4:1 vs 4.5:1 threshold); affects .k-sidebar-label, .k-stat-label, .k-page-sub, .k-stat-trend (11-12px UI chrome throughout the app); --k-text-secondary (#475569) passes at ~7.5:1. W-010 S4: Google Fonts loaded via CSS @import (render-blocking; browser must parse kinalys.css before discovering the font request); no <link rel=preconnect> or <link rel=preload> in public/index.html; display=swap present so FOIT avoided; fix = move to <link> tags in HTML. PASS: token system comprehensive, shadow/radius/spacing scales present, responsive stat-grid collapses (4->2->1), horizontal scroll prevented, sticky topbar via grid layout, number formatting adequate. N/A: fluid typography/line-length/container-queries (not applicable for data-dense B2B SaaS). Carries: button focus-visible/active/disabled gaps + emoji-icons without ARIA + heading semantics (div.k-page-title vs h1) + touch targets below 44px + static page title 'React App' -> task_008; empty states for other views + UX feedback patterns -> task_006; code-split/bundle -> task_009/013. Running totals (kinalys-web): S1:0 S2:3 S3:4 S4:3 S5:0 = 10 findings. Next: task_006 (D7 UI checklist batch 2 items 34-66 forms/inputs/feedback/motion), intended Sonnet 4.6.
